headline: Disney's Sports Dynasty Taps Into A $600 Billion Market Opportunity
summary: Disney (DIS) remains a strong buy: ESPN-led sports growth, NFL assets, the Hulu Live/FuboTV deal, and rising ads strengthen its ecosystem. Read the full analysis here.
